"description": "### Impact
An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to the RAM being exhausted. This requires accessing an image using `/FlateDecode` with large size values.

### Patches
This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.10.2](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.10.2).

### Workarounds
If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3734](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3734).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00226, "percentile": 0.13135}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x284-j5p8-9c5p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T21:30:25Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x284-j5p8-9c5p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x284-j5p8-9c5p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41314"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T22:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T21:30:25Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-x284-j5p8-9c5p", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3734", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.10.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41314", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/commit/ac734dab4eef92bcce50d503949b4d9887d89f11", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x284-j5p8-9c5p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-x284-j5p8-9c5p", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Manipulated FlateDecode image dimensions can exhaust RAM", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T15:44:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x284-j5p8-9c5p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.10.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.10.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Manipulated FlateDecode image dimensions can exhaust RAM
